title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI through slow, foundational mathematics rather than focusing on latest tools creates durable skills that survive technology cycles. He advocates that mathematical foundations, not tool familiarity, should be the priority for AI education and that people, not AI, drive meaningful change.
